---
title: "fr_besgsdag_5_9bba"
subtitle: "`fr_besgsdag_5_9bba`"
description: "fr_besgsdag_5_9bba"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/fr_besgsdag_5_9bba/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                     | Title                        | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                                   |
|--------------------------|------------------------------|--------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                  | The unique name of the event | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                            |
| `center`                 | Research center              | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                         |
| `book_bloodsample_wfv10` | book_bloodsample_wfv10       | string | Blood sample booking prior to visit. Workflow. Visit 10.                                                                                                      |
| `cgm_reader_wfv10`       | cgm_reader_wfv10             | string | Reader to be prepared for the visit. The same reader used to initialise the sensor at Visit 9. Wfv10. Derived using the formula: [besg_9_arm_1][cgmreader_v9] |
| `cgm_reader_ready_wfv10` | cgm_reader_ready_wfv10       | string | CGM reader ready. Workflow. Visit 10.                                                                                                                         |

: Fields in the `fr_besgsdag_5_9bba` resource.
